calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-18-2015 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE CYNTHIA M. LEE; Clerk EBura; Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-14-2015 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Mar-17-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Defendants Experts And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-12-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court vacated its tentative ruling requiring parties to appear, and ruled as follows: PLAINTIFF KERI VACA'S Motion To Strike Defendants Experts And For Sanctions is taken off calendar per request of the moving party. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

Notice Of Motion To Quash Or In The Alternative Modify Subpoena
Off Calendar Jan-12-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court vacated its tentative ruling, and ruled as follows: PLAINTIFF KERI VACA's Motion to Quash or, in the Alternative, Modify Subpoena is taken off calendar per request of the moving party. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-15-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion To Quash Or In The Alternative Modify Subpoena
Off Calendar Dec-30-2014 Continued To Jan-12-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ross Libenson, Esq., for plaintiff Keri Vaca.
Thomas Feeney, Esq., 510.267.7273, for defendant rafael Morales.

Both parties will not stipulate to have this matter heard before the judge pro tem. The matter is argued for the judge pro tem to prepare a report and recommendation. PLAINTIFF KERI VACA's Motion To Quash Or In The Alternative Modify Subpoena is continued to JAN-12-2015 at 9:30AM in Dept. 302. Judge Pro Tem Pater Van Zandt; Clerk Lesley Fiscella, not reported (302).
